verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got peace like a river, I've got peace like a river, I've got peace like a river, In my soul.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got joy like a fountain, I've got joy like a fountain, I've got joy like a fountain, In my soul.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've got love like an ocean, I've got love like an ocean, I've got love like an ocean, In my soul.
